__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    createWidget:
      path: /widgets
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request: Widget
      response:
        docs: ''
        type: Widget
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - path-parameters:
            tenant: tenant
            apiVersion: v1beta
          request:
            name: name
          response:
            body:
              name: name
    createInteractionStream_stream:
      path: /interactions/stream
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request: CreateInteractionStreamStreamRequest
      response-stream:
        docs: ''
        type: InteractionSseEvent
        format: sse
        terminator: '[DONE]'
        resumable: false
      examples:
        - path-parameters:
            tenant: tenant
            apiVersion: v1beta
          request:
            model: model
            input: input
          response:
            stream:
              - event: ''
                data:
                  delta: delta
    createInteractionStream:
      path: /interactions/stream
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request: CreateInteractionStreamRequest
      response:
        docs: ''
        type: Interaction
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - path-parameters:
            tenant: tenant
            apiVersion: v1beta
          request:
            model: model
            input: input
          response:
            body:
              id: id
              output: output
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml
types:
  CreateInteractionStreamStreamRequest:
    discriminated: false
    base-properties:
      stream: literal<true>
    union:
      - ModelInteractionRequest
      - AgentInteractionRequest
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CreateInteractionStreamRequest:
    discriminated: false
    base-properties:
      stream: literal<false>
    union:
      - ModelInteractionRequest
      - AgentInteractionRequest
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  Widget:
    properties:
      name: string
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  InteractionRequest:
    discriminated: false
    union:
      - ModelInteractionRequest
      - AgentInteractionRequest
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ModelInteractionRequest:
    properties:
      model: string
      input: string
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  AgentInteractionRequest:
    properties:
      agent: string
      input: string
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  Interaction:
    properties:
      id: optional<string>
      output: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  InteractionSseEvent:
    properties:
      delta: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Acme API
environments:
  Default: https://api.acme.com
default-environment: Default
base-path: /{tenant}/{apiVersion}
path-parameters:
  tenant:
    type: string
    docs: The tenant slug.
  apiVersion:
    type: string
    client-default: v1beta
